common: The Waters of the Sprudel Springs (CARLSBAD)

mental_emotional.text: Discouraged and anxious about domestic duties

head.text: Aches, with swollen temporal veins (Sang); better, motion, in open air

face.text: Yellow; sallow; red and hot; pain in zygomatic process; feels as if cobwebs were on it

stomach_abdomen.text: Tongue coated white. Offensive smell from mouth. Furry sensation. Sour or salty taste. Hiccough and yawning. Heartburn (Carbo)

urinary.text: Stream weak and slow; only passed by pressing abdominal muscles

stool_rectum.text: Feces held back. Stool slow, and only passed by much abdominal pressure. Burning in rectum and anus. Bleeding piles

keynotes.text: color="#800000">CARLSBAD AQUA The Waters of the Sprudel Springs (CARLSBAD) Famous for its action on the liver and in the treatment of obesity, diabetes, and gout. In homeopathic potencies useful in weakness of all organs, constipation, great liability to take cold. Periodicity, effects repeated after from two to four weeks (Oxal ac; Sulph). Flashes of heat all over. Itching on various parts.
